author: y4rr
content: Implemented on GPU: gpu_fftn_axes_c2c_f32/f64 via cufftPlanMany (rank=axes.len(), n=shape[axes[i]], idist=transform_vol, batch=spatial/transform_vol). Dispatcher in fft.rs routes innermost-axes cases to GPU; non-innermost axes (e.g. axes=[0] on [d,h,w,2]) fall back with NotImplementedOnCuda (pre-permute step not yet implemented). Removed cascade_skip for ndim_3_axes_neg1 and ndim_3_axes_n2_n1 in conformance_fft.rs. 6 probe tests pass in _probe_966_fftn_axes_planmany.rs. All 14 GPU FFT conformance tests pass.
